title: My Love Story with Yamada-kun at Lv999
sourceNotes: The 2023 TV anime (Madhouse, 13 eps, single season) adapts roughly chapters 1-41 of Mashiro's manga; episode 13 lands around chapter 40-41, so a viewer resumes reading near chapter 42. This is a loosely-arced online-gaming romcom, so episode-to-chapter boundaries are approximate and evenly apportioned (~3 chapters/ep). Paired with the manga (serialized in Ganma! since 2019), which is ongoing on an irregular schedule; the latest chapter is ~110 (MangaDex tracks through ch 108), so the unadapted tail runs to ch 110 and will grow. No theatrical films exist.

mappings.arc: Online Game & Breakup (Akane meets YAMADA in FOS; first offline meetup)
Real-Life Meetings (Collab Cafe & Higashinari School Festival)
